response.title: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst
response.description: We are seeking a Senior Healthcare Data Analyst to join our team, responsible for analyzing healthcare data to provide insights that improve patient outcomes and operational efficiency. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in data analysis within the healthcare industry and be adept at using various analytical tools and methodologies.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Healthcare Administration, Data Science, Statistics, or related field. Master's degree preferred.
